title: Add direct integration/sync with Dawarich (dawarich.app)
description:
Summary: Support a direct integration/export from iso.me to Dawarich using their API to sync/upload location points.

> have you considered adding direct integrations/sync to  dawarich (https://dawarich.app/) directly from the app? they have an api for development i believe

Context: In the thread the commenter clarified they mean an export directly from iso.me to Dawarich; they also noted Dawarich can connect to a server and upload points from its app.

Source: https://discord.com/channels/1443424100759634003/1498086747123355699/1500632015131901962
author: CodyBontecou
